judge_reason: Description A describes a photographic negative page with punched holes and handwritten number, while Description B describes a standard typed page with specific witness names and UAP details, indicating they are viewing completely different visual content.
original_image_tags: A dark, typewritten document page with the word "RESTRICTED" stamped at the top and bottom. The text is white on a black background, characteristic of a photographic negative or a copy made on a reverse-process machine. There are three punched holes along the left margin. A handwritten page number "139" is in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned page of a typed report cover with “RESTRICTED” stamped at the top and bottom, three punched binder holes on the left margin, and a small handwritten page number “39” in the lower right corner.*
